scenarios.text: Extremely loud music blasting from apartment 4B, third floor. This is the fourth weekend in a row. It's 2:30 AM and my kids can't sleep.
Man collapsed on sidewalk outside the bodega on 5th Ave, not breathing, lips turning blue. Bystanders attempting CPR. Need EMS immediately.
Thick black smoke pouring out of third floor windows of the brownstone at 142 Atlantic Ave. People screaming from inside. Flames visible now.
Car flipped over on the BQE near exit 28. Driver appears trapped inside the vehicle. Fuel leaking onto the roadway. Two other vehicles involved.
Unattended black duffel bag left next to the subway entrance at Times Square 42nd St station. Has been sitting there for 30+ minutes. No one has claimed it.
